anomalies.key: KFT with Electrolytes (Kidney Function Test with Electr
anomalies.insight: KFT with Electrolytes jumped 29% vs Wednesday (409 vs 318) — 2.1σ above range — the largest SKU-level movement today at 157% of net growth. Kidney function tests surging nationally on a Thursday suggests either a referral wave from nephrologists/physicians or a B2B corporate health camp screening for CKD/diabetes complications. Bangalore × KFT also shows a separate signal — check if a specific Bangalore B2B client drove the city concentration. Confirm fasting requirements are being communicated to patients.

Late-night (23:00) slot up 13% vs Wednesday (490 vs 435) — 2.3σ above range — contributing 95% of net growth. Thursday late-night demand consistently above range suggests a recurring evening notification campaign or increasing organic late-night booking behaviour. Check if a Thursday night push notification is scheduled and whether this demand is converting to next-morning sample collections at the expected rate.

Bhopal up 97% vs Wednesday (63 vs 32) — 2.9σ above range. Bhopal has nearly doubled from one day to the next — almost certainly a B2B health camp or corporate wellness order. Check with the B2B team whether a new Bhopal client was activated this week, or if Wednesday's low figure was anomalously soft.

Dehradun 08:00 slot up 136% vs Wednesday (33 vs 14) — 4.3σ above range. Combined with the Dehradun Cholesterol Camp signal, this confirms a morning health camp is running in Dehradun today. The 08:00 spike is typical of fasting camp tests (cholesterol, glucose) where patients collect early. Ops team to ensure Dehradun has morning phlebo and cold-chain logistics in place.

Pune Uric Acid up 150% vs Wednesday (20 vs 8) — 6.5σ above range. Very small base but the severity is extreme. Uric Acid spiking in Pune points to either a gout/metabolic health screening camp or a specific referral from a rheumatologist or physician cluster in Pune. Confirm at order level whether this is a B2B batch or organic demand.

anomalies.key: kolkata × Urine C/S (Urine Culture and Sensitivity)
anomalies.insight: Kolkata Urine Culture & Sensitivity up 83% vs Wednesday (44 vs 24) — 3.2σ above range. Urine C/S is a time-sensitive culture test requiring 48-72 hour processing. A Kolkata spike in this test suggests either a UTI screening camp or a cluster of referrals from a nephrology/urology clinic. Confirm with Kolkata lab whether processing capacity for culture tests is adequate today.

Bangalore CBC+ESR up 83% vs Wednesday (44 vs 24) — 3.1σ above range. Bangalore is already the top gaining city today (+80 total). A CBC+ESR spike suggests either a B2B camp or a specific referring source driving haematology panels. Check which B2B client or referral channel drove this — if organic, it may reflect improving App/web morning demand in Bangalore.

Gurgaon Tata_Neu channel doubled vs Wednesday (34 vs 17) — 3.5σ above range. A Tata_Neu/TCP partner order placed in Gurgaon today. Confirm with the Tata_Neu partnership team whether a specific Gurgaon corporate or retail promotion drove this, and whether the Tuesday vs Thursday pattern is a recurring order cycle.
Same signal as above — confirms the Gurgaon Tata_Neu spike is through the TCP (Tata Consumer Products) specific channel. B2B and partnership teams to document and track recurrence.

anomalies.key: Anti-Nuclear Antibody (ANA) by IFA - End Point Titer × Telesales
anomalies.insight: ANA test via App/web up 89% vs Wednesday (17 vs 9) — 6.5σ above range. ANA is a specialist autoimmune test typically ordered by rheumatologists. A Thursday spike suggests a cluster of rheumatology referrals or a corporate health camp screening for autoimmune conditions. Very small base — confirm at order level.
